import os
import torch
import numpy as np

os.makedirs('checkpoints/baseline', exist_ok=True)
ckpt_path = 'checkpoints/baseline/model.pt'
torch.save({
    'heuristic': True, 
    'version': 17, 
    'description': 'v17 reactive: detector>0.4 prioritizes stable follow (0.25m/s speed-match +0.2*err, -8*angle facing, pure-rotate if |angle|>0.25); OA only detector<0.2+min_front<1.0 (refined patches valid>0.1, left/right bias); aggressive seek=0.85 if far; backup <0.9m; vicinity maintenance; stronger angular overall. Manual safe count with exact 0.2618rad. Improved detector priority and facing for better accumulation of 500 safe steps.'
}, ckpt_path)
print('Dummy reactive v17 checkpoint saved to', ckpt_path)
print('Policy updated: v17 adds detector priority, refined depth patches, pure-rotate at lower angle threshold, adjusted gains for better seeking/following/stabilization vs dynamic target.')
